svg.text: 7 guardrail layers across 5 phases — where, when, and why

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the input sanitizer work in Phase 1?')
sendPrompt('How does PII redaction work before LLM calls?')
sendPrompt('How do you detect prompt injection in uploaded documents?')
sendPrompt('What does the audit trail capture at ingestion?')
g.text: Audit: SHA-256 hash of every input document + PII redaction log + injection scan verdict

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does metadata-gated retrieval prevent cross-tenant leakage?')
sendPrompt('How do you prevent KB poisoning?')
sendPrompt('How does context size limiting work in RAG?')

g.text: Audit: Query vector hash + retrieval candidates + KB version stamp

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do score guardrails prevent hallucinated confidence?')
sendPrompt('How does the prompt firewall protect against LLM manipulation?')
sendPrompt('How does the output schema validator catch hallucinated classifications?')
sendPrompt('How does the sanity checker catch contradictions?')
sendPrompt('How do you prevent sensitive data from leaking into LLM responses?')
sendPrompt('How does the context firewall detect cross-requirement conflicts?')
sendPrompt('How is PII stripped from the final fitment report?')
sendPrompt('How does the immutable audit trail work?')

g.text: Audit: HITL override log + conflict resolution + final matrix hash

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does RBAC protect the DYNAFIT pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does rate limiting protect the LLM endpoint?')
sendPrompt('How does encryption at rest and in transit work?')
sendPrompt('How does the observability stack detect anomalies?')
sendPrompt('How does secret management work in the pipeline?')

svg.text: 14 guardrails · 7 layers · 5 phases · zero trust boundaries at every data handoff
